Operation 'searchCharacters' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks specificity about search behavior (partial vs exact matching), authentication requirements, and the comprehensive nature of returned data. Added clarity about character types (superheroes and villains), search matching behavior, complete list of returned profile sections, and authentication requirement. Enhanced summary to specify character types for better AI agent context and domain clarity.

data.current_description: Searches for characters matching the given name. Returns an array of matching characters with their full profiles.
data.summary_suggestion: Search superheroes and villains by name
data.description_suggestion: Searches the character database for superheroes and villains matching the provided name string. Supports partial name matching. Returns an array of matching character objects, each containing complete profile data including power stats, biography, appearance, work, connections, and images. Requires valid access token authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about search behavior (partial vs exact matching), authentication requirements, and the comprehensive nature of returned data. Added clarity about character types (superheroes and villains), search matching behavior, complete list of returned profile sections, and authentication requirement. Enhanced summary to specify character types for better AI agent context and domain clarity.

message: Operation 'getCharacterWork' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. While the summary is adequate, the description is too brief and lacks clarity about what 'occupation' and 'base of operations' specifically contain. Enhanced description clarifies the output structure and helps AI agents understand the scope of returned work information.

data.current_description: Retrieves occupation and base of operations for a character.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves work-related information for a character including occupation and base of operations. Returns structured work data with occupation details and operational headquarters or base location.
data.reasoning: While the summary is adequate, the description is too brief and lacks clarity about what 'occupation' and 'base of operations' specifically contain. Enhanced description clarifies the output structure and helps AI agents understand the scope of returned work information.

message: Operation 'getCharacterConnections' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear, but description lacks specificity about what constitutes 'group affiliations' and 'relatives'. Enhanced description clarifies that this includes both organizational memberships and family relationships, improving AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieves group affiliations and relatives for a character.

data.reasoning: Summary is clear, but description lacks specificity about what constitutes 'group affiliations' and 'relatives'. Enhanced description clarifies that this includes both organizational memberships and family relationships, improving AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.
